title: On your work ethic
content: You're the first one in and the last one out — but honestly, it's making the rest of us look bad in the best way possible.

title: Something I never said
content: You changed how I think about problems. I've never told you that out loud, but it's true.

title: Honest critique
content: Your ideas are brilliant but you undersell them every single time. Speak louder — the room is listening.

title: What the team thinks
content: Everyone notices how you handle pressure. You make chaos feel manageable, and nobody says it enough.

title: Growth note
content: You're great at starting things. The next level for you is finishing them with the same energy.

title: From someone who watches
content: The way you treat people who can do nothing for you says everything about your character.

title: Hard truth
content: You're playing too small. The version of you that takes risks is the one we all want to see more of.

title: Quietly inspired
content: I started working out because of you. You didn't say a word — I just watched and decided to change.
